summary: A major earthquake strikes Venezuela, causing widespread damage. Widespread evacuations are underway across affected regions. Video captures the immediate aftermath and resident reactions.

headline: Scotland fans face anxious World Cup wait after bruising Brazil defeat
summary: Scotland suffers a 3-0 defeat against Brazil. Fans face an anxious wait for World Cup qualification. Third place in Group C offers a glimmer of hope for the last 32.

summary: Scotland's World Cup hopes are in peril after a 3-0 loss to Brazil. Tartan Army fans voice their "Typical Scotland" reactions. The defeat casts doubt on advancing to knockout stages.

headline: UK sees hottest June day on record as 36.1C recorded in Hampshire
summary: The UK records its hottest June day ever. Temperatures soared to 36.1C in Hampshire. Heat records were broken across southern England.
